AgeGate.description: Age-gate rules applied at sign-up or first-use.

failure_behaviour.description:
Behaviour when a user fails the gate (e.g.
`"redirect to parental-consent flow"`, `"disable in-app purchases"`,
`"show restricted experience"`).

gated_surfaces.description:
Which product surfaces the age-gate guards (e.g.
`["sign-up", "behavioural-ads", "social-feed"]`).

minimum_age.description:
Minimum age required to use the unrestricted product experience.
Typically 13 (US/COPPA), 16 (EU/GDPR-K), or the jurisdiction-specific
minimum where the product targets children.

AgeVerificationMethod.description: Method used to gate users by age at sign-up.

oneOf.description:
User is asked to enter a date of birth; input is not independently
verified. Acceptable for COPPA-grade age-gating per FTC guidance
when combined with a non-coercive, neutral flow.
Age range selection from a bucketed dropdown (e.g. 13-17, 18+).

Third-party age estimation / verification (e.g. Yoti, Incode).
`provider` is the service name.

Government-ID verification (passport, national id). Required for
some regulated contexts (gambling-adjacent products, high-risk
fintech).

Parental consent flow (verified by a trusted proxy) per COPPA §
312.5. `flow` is a short label (e.g. `"verified-credit-card"`,
`"signed-consent-form"`, `"video-conference-verification"`).

PathRef.description:
Path-based cross-reference relative to .corpospec/ root.
Pattern: `^[a-z0-9_-]+(/[a-z0-9_.-]+)+$`

description:
Privacy classification for a B2C product. Aggregates the regulatory flags
and store-compliance signals that drive age-gate logic, ad-targeting
policy, and store-listing content ratings.

Scope: one per product (or per tenant for single-product shops). Lives
at `legal/privacy-classification.yaml`.

admob_category_filter.description:
Google AdMob content-filter category (e.g. `"G"`, `"PG"`, `"T"`,
`"MA"`) or the strictest category when multiple surfaces are served.

age_gate.description:
Structured age-gate configuration, when one is applied at sign-up.
`None` means no age gate exists (e.g. B2B products where authors
explicitly declare the audience is adult-only by contract).

app_store_content_rating.description:
App Store / Play Store content rating (e.g. `"4+"`, `"12+"`, `"17+"`,
`"Everyone"`, `"Teen"`, `"Mature"`). Values depend on the store and
rating body (ESRB, PEGI, USK, CERO).

coppa.description:
Whether the product is subject to COPPA (Children's Online Privacy
Protection Act, US, 15 U.S.C. §§ 6501–6506). True iff the product
is directed at children under 13 or has actual knowledge that it
collects personal information from children under 13.

gdpr_k_minimum_age.description:
Minimum age used for GDPR-K parental-consent branching. Default is
the strictest EU member-state threshold (16). Tenants operating in
member states with lower minimums may override.

gdpr_kids.description:
Whether the product is subject to GDPR-K (Art. 8 GDPR — children's
data). Member-state minimum ages range 13–16; see `gdpr_k_minimum_age`.

notes.description:
Free-form notes (e.g. "COPPA-safe because behavioural targeting
disabled at the AdMob account level for the under-13 surface").

policy.description:
PathRef to a `legal/policies/*.yaml` privacy / children policy that
encodes the public-facing prose.

product.description:
Product the classification applies to (PathRef to a `product/*.yaml`).
Optional for single-product tenants where the mapping is implicit.

related_decisions.description:
PathRefs to BDRs that rationalise the classification
(e.g. `governance/decisions/0011-coppa-posture`).

title: PrivacyClassification
